title: Invisible Market
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the criminal trade|the underworld's "[[Invisible Economy]]"}}
{{Otheruses|market}}
[[File:Invisible.jpg|thumb|250px|Smugglers and Invisible Marketeers at work]]
The '''Invisible Market''' was the criminal trade that went beyond the [[Black market/Legends|black market]]. Little was known about it, except that [[Lannik Racto]] sold numerous [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droids]] through the market. [[Slavery/Legends|Slaves]] were also sold on the Invisible Market.

The [[Saurin/Legends|Saurin]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Merchant/Legends|trader]] [[Hrchek Kal Fas/Legends|Hrchek Kal Fas]] scoured the Invisible Market for the best droid prices.<ref name="CCG-Saurin">{{CCG|set=A New Hope Limited|cardname=Saurin}}</ref> [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]]' mask may have been bought in the Invisible Market for artistic purposes by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] years after the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="sgg">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/insideronline/86/indexp2.html|text=The Story of General Grievous: Lord of War|int=The Story of General Grievous: Lord of War}}</ref>
